expected_deltas.content: Reporting a billing issue within 14 days is associated with, but does not guarantee, a refund being issued
expected_deltas.source_span: Refunds are typically issued when customers report a billing issue within 14 days of the charge.
expected_deltas.note: The word 'typically' plus the following sentence about individual case review mean the 14-day window is a precondition/correlation, not strict deterministic causation. A pipeline that extracts this as a hard rule ('reporting within 14 days causes a refund') is over-claiming what the text supports.

expected_deltas.content: Submitting a refund request through the self-service portal is associated with faster processing than email
expected_deltas.source_span: Refund requests submitted through the self-service portal are processed faster than those submitted via email
expected_deltas.note: Correlation between channel and speed, not necessarily a stated causal mechanism — could plausibly be confounded by request complexity, which the text doesn't rule out.
